judge_reason: Both descriptions agree on the core visual content—a hand-drawn sketch of a circle with radiating lines containing the text '30"'—but B adds a claim about a surrounding typed label ('Object') that A omits without contradiction.
original_image_tags: Hand-drawn sketch of a circle with short lines radiating outward from its perimeter, resembling a sun. A horizontal line is drawn across the center of the circle. Inside the circle, above the line, is handwritten text "30\"".
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: Typed report page with a hand-drawn circular sketch labeled “30"” and short radiating lines around the circle, plus visible typewritten text and “CONFIDENTIAL” stamps at top and bottom.*
